headline: Big Balder Brand: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Big Balder Brand is projected #2 of 16 with a 88.39 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Trey McBride, Rashee Rice, and A.J. Brown. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Big Balder Brand traded with DMV Fantasy and acquired Trey McBride while sending George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand). Trey McBride is now the current TE starter at 99.5 C-AVI and 92.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Chris Godwin's 62.4 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 79.0 C-AVI would directly attack the 2.07-point projected gap to Conquistadors.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On October 29, Mile High Royal Lions traded with TacticsNoob and acquired Marvin Harrison while sending Rachaad White, 2026 Round 2 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand). Marvin Harrison is now the current FLEX starter at 72.8 C-AVI and 79.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

rival_below.summary: On October 29, Mile High Royal Lions traded with TacticsNoob and acquired Marvin Harrison while sending Rachaad White, 2026 Round 2 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand). Marvin Harrison is now the current FLEX starter at 72.8 C-AVI and 79.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #2 of 16 at 88.39 lineup C-AVI. Conquistadors is immediately above at 90.46, a gap of 2.07. Mile High Royal Lions is immediately behind at 83.88.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Trey McBride (99.5), Rashee Rice (95.5), and A.J. Brown (94.2).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 15, Big Balder Brand traded with DMV Fantasy and acquired Trey McBride while sending George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand). Trey McBride is now the current TE starter at 99.5 C-AVI and 92.0 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Chris Godwin's 62.4 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 79.0 C-AVI would directly attack the 2.07-point projected gap to Conquistadors. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
